hooks.statusMessage: Running pytest + npm test before commit (~90s)...
hooks.command: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ( cd "$ROOT/backend" && "$ROOT/.venv/Scripts/pytest" tests/ --tb=short -q --ignore=tests/test_segmentation_eval.py --deselect 'tests/test_segment_encoder_feature_matrix.py::TestEncodeSegmentUsesFeatureMatrix::test_encode_segment_embedding_size_unchanged_by_new_config_defaults' --deselect 'tests/test_operation_result_contract.py::test_operation_result_fixture_is_valid_json_and_uses_shared_fields' ) && ( cd "$ROOT/frontend" && npm test ) || { echo 'Pre-commit tests failed - fix before committing (3 known pre-existing failures are auto-skipped; see .claude/settings.json).' >&2; exit 2; }
